name: Chicken Casablanca
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan. Add onions and cook until softened.
2. Stir in ginger and garlic, cooking for an additional minute.
3. Transfer the mixture to a crockpot.
4. Brown chicken pieces in the same pan over medium heat, then add them to the crockpot.
5. Scatter carrots, potatoes, and zucchini around the chicken.
6. In a small bowl, combine raisins, cumin, turmeric, salt, pepper, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper.
7. Sprinkle the seasoning mixture evenly over the chicken.
8. Add chopped tomatoes and garbanzo beans to the crockpot.
9. Pour in the can of chopped tomatoes.
10. Cover and cook on HIGH for 4 to 6 hours.
11. About 30 minutes before serving, add parsley and cilantro to the dish.
12. Serve hot over cooked rice or couscous.
